system.damage: flames & fire (damage and tags by HP, +dangerous)
system.specialQuality: fireproof harmed only by magical attacks, water, or smothering
system.moves:
- Set nearby combustibles alight
- Manifest a vortex out of nearby fire, cinder, smoke, and ash
- Extinguish fires, absorbing their power (near, area)
- Engulf a smaller foe (+messy, +ignores armor)
- Fling flames (+near; costs 1d4 HP)
- Leap across a barrier (but lose 1d4 HP)

A fire vortex absorbs power from heat and flames. It gains 1d4 HP by spending a day in an oven or an hour in a forge or kiln, or by absorbing a raging fire. When you target a fire vortex or its matrix with magical fire or heat, it takes no dam- age. If the vortex has 18 HP or less, it gains 1d4 HP instead.
